Home / Services / Sewer Line Repair and Replacement

Sewer Line Repair and Replacement

Reliable sewer line repair and replacement services.

English Excavating & Plumbing Co. Inc provides dependable sewer line repair and replacement services for homeowners and businesses in Indianapolis. We understand the inconvenience and potential health hazards associated with sewer line problems. Our experienced team utilizes advanced equipment and techniques to diagnose and repair or replace damaged sewer lines quickly and efficiently. We offer trenchless repair options to minimize disruption to your property and landscaping. We also provide traditional excavation methods for more extensive repairs or replacements. We handle everything from minor leaks to complete sewer line failures. We use high-quality materials and adhere to strict industry standards to ensure long-lasting performance. We also provide sewer line inspections and preventative maintenance services to help you avoid costly repairs in the future. We understand the importance of prompt and reliable service, and we strive to resolve your sewer line problems as quickly as possible.

Our Process

  1. 01 Sewer line inspection and diagnosis
  2. 02 Repair or replacement of damaged sections
  3. 03 Trenchless or traditional excavation methods
  4. 04 Backfilling and compaction
  5. 05 Testing and verification

Benefits

  • Reliable and efficient sewer line repair
  • Prevention of health hazards and property damage
  • Minimized disruption to property and landscaping
  • Long-lasting performance

Frequently Asked Questions

What are the signs of a sewer line problem?

Signs of a sewer line problem include slow drains, sewage backups, foul odors, and gurgling sounds in the plumbing system.

What is trenchless sewer repair?

Trenchless sewer repair is a method of repairing or replacing damaged sewer lines without digging a trench, minimizing disruption to your property.

How long does it take to repair or replace a sewer line?

The time required to repair or replace a sewer line depends on the extent of the damage and the method used. We strive to complete repairs as quickly as possible while ensuring quality workmanship.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with sewer line repair and replacement? Contact us today.
